title: Z-Rok
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Stele6.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] flies a [[TIE/ad starfighter]] against an [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] from ''Rok'' group.]]
'''Z-Rok''' was a group of four [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Assassin-class corvettes]] belonging to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]]. They were part of the second [[Battle of To-phalion Base|attack]] on [[To-phalion Base]] which had the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90]] corvette ''[[Vorknkx]]'' inside. The corvettes managed to destroy the asteroid defenses which were disabled by [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] but all four corvettes were destroyed by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Behind the scenes==
The corvettes were called ''Z-Rok'' to remind the player that they belonged to Zaarin.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'' Collector's CD-ROM]] {{1st}}
